Here's how you know 
Official websites use .gov 
A .gov website belongs to an official government organization in the United States.
Secure .gov websites use HTTPS 
A lock ( ) or https:// means you've safely connected to the .gov website. Share sensitive information only on official, secure websites.

Media Resources 
Mar. 26, 2024 
What to know 
CDC b-roll is produced by the United States Government and is in the public domain. This means that the footage is meant for public use and is not subject to copyright law protections. 
Permission is not required for use of public domain items. However, we do ask that you cite CDC as the source. 
Overview 
Tip 
To download any video file, right click on the video link and select "Save target as". 
For images, visit the Public Health Image Library (PHIL) . We also
